name: Apple Pandowdy
recipeIngredient: 3 cups tart apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Butter a (1 1/2 quart) baking dish.
3. Arrange the sliced apples in the dish and sprinkle with the nutmeg, cinnamon, and 1/3 of the salt.
4. Spoon the molasses over the apples.
5. Cover the dish with foil.
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, sugar, and remaining salt.
8. Melt the butter in a small pan and remove from heat.
9. Stir in the milk and egg.
10. Beat well and blend into the flour mixture.
11. Pour the batter over the apples.
12. Return the baking dish to the oven.
13. Bake until a toothpick comes out clean (about 30 minutes).
14. Serve topped with whipped cream.
